allow: PowerShell(python -c "import yt_dlp, shutil; print\('yt_dlp', yt_dlp.version.__version__\); print\('ffmpeg', shutil.which\('ffmpeg'\)\)")

PowerShell($c = Get-Command conda -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.Source } else { "conda not on PATH" }; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\anaconda3\\Scripts\\conda.exe"\) { "FOUND anaconda3" }; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\miniconda3\\Scripts\\conda.exe"\) { "FOUND miniconda3" })

PowerShell(& "C:\\Users\\PhantomGrogu\\anaconda3\\condabin\\conda.bat" run -n mlenv python -c "import yt_dlp, shutil; print\('yt_dlp', yt_dlp.version.__version__\); print\('ffmpeg', shutil.which\('ffmpeg'\)\)")

PowerShell(& "C:\\Users\\PhantomGrogu\\anaconda3\\condabin\\conda.bat" run -n mlenv python -c "import yt_dlp; o={'quiet':True,'no_warnings':True}; i=yt_dlp.YoutubeDL\(o\).extract_info\('https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aqz-KE-bpKQ',download=False\); fs=[f for f in i['formats'] if f.get\('vcodec'\) not in \(None,'none'\)]; print\('itag  ext   res     vcodec        acodec'\); [print\(str\(f.get\('format_id'\)\).ljust\(5\), str\(f.get\('ext'\)\).ljust\(5\), str\(f.get\('height'\)\).ljust\(6\), str\(f.get\('vcodec'\)\)[:12].ljust\(13\), f.get\('acodec'\)\) for f in fs]")
PowerShell(& "C:\\Users\\PhantomGrogu\\anaconda3\\condabin\\conda.bat" run -n mlenv python -c "import shutil; print\('ffmpeg ->', shutil.which\('ffmpeg'\)\)")
PowerShell(& "C:\\Users\\PhantomGrogu\\anaconda3\\condabin\\conda.bat" run -n mlenv pip install imageio-ffmpeg 2>&1)

PowerShell(& "C:\\Users\\PhantomGrogu\\anaconda3\\condabin\\conda.bat" run -n mlenv python -c "import imageio_ffmpeg as i; exe=i.get_ffmpeg_exe\(\); print\('EXE',exe\); import subprocess; r=subprocess.run\([exe,'-version'],capture_output=True,text=True\); print\(r.stdout.splitlines\(\)[0] if r.stdout else 'NO OUTPUT','rc',r.returncode\)")

PowerShell($d = Join-Path $env:TEMP 'ytv_cache'; "CACHE DIR: $d"; if \(Test-Path $d\) { Get-ChildItem $d -Recurse -File | Select-Object FullName, @{n='MB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize; "TOTAL MB: " + [math]::Round\(\(\(Get-ChildItem $d -Recurse -File | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1MB\),1\) } else { "not created yet" })
